diffs.diff:
--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -135,15 +135,19 @@
             'model_state_dict': model.state_dict(),

             'val_acc': best_acc,

             'class_counts': class_counts_list,

-            'stage': 1

         }, best_path)

-        print(f'New best (stage1): {acc:.4f}')

-print('Stage 1 completed. Best val acc so far: {:.4f}'.format(best_acc))

+        print(f'New best (stage1): {best_acc:.4f}')

+print('Stage 1 completed. Best val acc so far:', best_acc)

 

 # Stage 2: freeze backbone, train only classifier with strong balancing

 print('Starting Stage 2')

-for param in list(model.model.parameters()):

-    param.requires_grad = False

+# Freeze backbone, only fc requires grad

+for name, param in model.named_parameters():

+    if 'fc' not in name:

+        param.requires_grad = False

+    else:

+        param.requires_grad = True

+print('Num params requiring grad:', sum(p.requires_grad for p in model.parameters()))

 optimizer_s2 = optim.SGD(model.fc.parameters(), lr=0.05, momentum=0.9, weight_decay=1e-4, nesterov=True)

 scheduler_s2 = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer_s2, T_max=30)

 for epoch in range(30):

@@ -179,8 +183,7 @@
             'model_state_dict': model.state_dict(),

             'val_acc': best_acc,

             'class_counts': class_counts_list,

-            'stage': 2

         }, best_path)

-        print(f'New best (stage2): {acc:.4f}')

+        print(f'New best (stage2): {best_acc:.4f}')

 print('Training completed, best checkpoint saved to', best_path)

 print('Best val acc:', best_acc)
